observations.finding: The canvas-text metadata for the in-scene Input Evidence panel now includes a capture status line: Capture: 19 blockers; vr 0; window 180.
The desktop Quest Evidence panel remains readable and still shows the separate Frames, Loop, Input, Movement, Trace, and Validation rows.

adversarialNotes: This is not Quest 3 physical readiness evidence; it only proves that the browser runtime publishes the capture readiness text into canvas-text metadata.
Desktop preview still reports vr 0 and immersiveSessionStarted false, so it cannot validate the in-headset placement, scale, readability, or comfort of the new capture line.
The in-scene text panel now has six lines in a 1.65m by 0.72m panel, so the next worn-headset visual QA pass should check for crowding or clipping.

inputPanelPreviewLines: Trace hand select: blocked; dwell 0ms; trace_unavailable
